name: consult and development write-time both call the one shared enforce-write-time primitive that owns the write-time flags
command: grep -q 'enforce-write-time.sh' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-pre-write.sh" && grep -q 'enforce-write-time.sh' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh" && grep -q -- '--single-file-gate' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-write-time.sh" && grep -q -- '--include-app-code' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-write-time.sh" && echo same-write-time-engine 1>&2
